examples.text: إِنَّ مَا تُوعَدُونَ لَآتٍ وَمَا أَنْتُمْ بِمُعْجِزِينَ
examples.english: Indeed, what you have been promised will certainly come to pass. And you will have no escape.

examples.text: وَمَنْ لَا يُجِبْ دَاعِيَ اللَّهِ فَلَيْسَ بِمُعْجِزٍ فِي الْأَرْضِ
examples.english: And whoever does not respond to the caller of Allah will have no escape on earth.

etymology.text: Derived from the active participle of أَعْجَزَ (ʔaʕjaza).
